candidate_scope: Internal three-layer enforcement of the six-axiom block plus Theorem NT firewall: text lint, TLA+ TLC verification, Python cert validators. The bundle's audience and scope are internal repository coherence between these three layers, not external upstream community distribution.
in_scope_rationale: This bundle's audience is the project's own maintainers and any reviewer auditing the cert-family ecosystem. Its semantics scope is: confirm that the linter and TLA+ TLC verification agree on what 'QA legality' means at the generator-transition level. Out-of-scope: external TLA+ community submission, unbounded soundness proofs, observer-side projection formalism beyond the firewall invariant.

comparables.norm_supported: semantic enforcement of the same six-axiom dictionary at text-source level (regex + AST); shares the same audience (this repo's maintainers) and the same scope (QA-state legality)

structural TLA+ spec inside the same bundle; same readme/structure conventions; consumes the axiom annotations that QARM_v02_Failures.tla establishes; semantics-aligned with this bundle's generator algebra

Python cert family that shares the axiom dictionary; structurally similar (mapping_protocol_ref + validator + fixtures); audience-aligned (this repo's reviewers); semantics-aligned (same QA legality predicate)
prose specification of Theorem NT; same audience (this repo's maintainers); the bundle's Inv_NT is the runtime witness of this prose spec
